analysis.wait_does_not_complete: waittimestamp times out — GPU may not fully retire NOP without fence event
analysis.implication: Rusticl submit ret=0 ts=1 does NOT prove compute shader executed. A NOP IB produces identical submit behavior.

conclusion: Timestamp assignment proves kernel accepted command buffer. It does NOT prove GPU executed compute shader or produced memory side effects. clFinish returning success after GPU_COMMAND ret=0 is consistent with NOP-like IB submission.

ioctl_correction.struct_fix: kgsl_command_object has offset field before gpuaddr
